title: Section 10
content: Teaching at 1[Institutes].--All teaching at 2 [each of the Institutes] shall be conducted by or in the name of the Institute in accordance with the Statutes and the Ordinances made in this behalf. .
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 13, for "Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022). 2. Subs. by s. 13, ibid., for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
